summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Parent Portal and Gradebook Reports features. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Both features are fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/gradebook/report/{class_id} returns report with students, assignments, averages
Backend: Gradebook report student data has correct structure (student_id, first_name, last_name, assignments_completed, total_points, max_points, average)
Backend: Invalid class ID returns 404 for gradebook report
Backend: POST /api/students/{student_id}/portal-token generates portal token
Backend: Portal token generation is idempotent (returns same token on repeated requests)
Backend: Invalid student ID returns 404 for portal token generation
Backend: GET /api/portal/{token} returns student data without authentication
Backend: Portal data has complete structure (student, classes, attendance, assignments, recent_grades)
Backend: Invalid portal token returns 404
Backend: Portal endpoint is publicly accessible (no auth required)
Backend: Portal data doesn't expose write operations (read-only)
Frontend: Gradebook Reports page loads with class statistics (GPA, Average, Students, Assignments)
Frontend: Grade Distribution section shows A,B,C,D,F counts
Frontend: Student Detail table shows GPA and letter grades
Frontend: Print button (Imprimir) is present and clickable
Frontend: Class selector and Refresh button work correctly
Frontend: Parent Portal accessible via token URL without login
Frontend: Portal shows student info with GPA (3.18) and letter grade (B)
Frontend: Portal shows quick stats (GPA, Grade %, Attendance Rate, Classes)
Frontend: Portal Grades tab shows class grades with recent assignments
Frontend: Portal Attendance tab shows attendance summary (Present, Absent, Tardy, Excused)
Frontend: Portal Assignments tab shows assignments list with due dates and scores
Frontend: Portal is completely read-only (no edit/delete buttons visible)
Frontend: Portal shows 'Portal de Solo Lectura' badge
Frontend: Teachers can generate portal links from Classes page (green link icon)
Frontend: Portal link dialog shows student name, access link, and copy button
Frontend: Invalid portal token shows error page with contact teacher message
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: portal_0a88ee368639449ab9c34b2303c47854 token for Test Student
context_for_next_testing_agent: Parent Portal and Gradebook Reports features fully functional. Portal token: portal_0a88ee368639449ab9c34b2303c47854. Portal URL: /portal/{token} (public, no auth). Gradebook Reports URL: /gradebook/reports (requires auth). Test credentials: test@school.edu / testpassword (role: super_admin). Data-testid attributes: print-gradebook-report-btn, gradebook-report-class-select, refresh-gradebook-report-btn, portal-link-input, copy-portal-link-btn

gradebook_reports.class_statistics: GPA Promedio, Promedio (%), Estudiantes count, Tareas count
gradebook_reports.grade_distribution: A, B, C, D, F counts displayed in colored boxes
gradebook_reports.student_detail_table: Student name, Tareas Completadas, Puntos, Porcentaje, GPA, Nota (letter grade)

parent_portal.student_info: Name, GPA, Letter Grade displayed in header
parent_portal.quick_stats: GPA, Grade %, Attendance Rate, Classes count
parent_portal.attendance_tab: Summary (Present, Absent, Tardy, Excused) and history
parent_portal.assignments_tab: Upcoming assignments and assignment list with scores
parent_portal.read_only: No edit/delete buttons, 'Portal de Solo Lectura' badge
parent_portal.error_handling: Invalid token shows 'Enlace Inválido' error page

portal_link_generation.location: Classes page, student row, green link icon
portal_link_generation.dialog: Shows student name, access link, copy button
